name: io.github.softoft-orga/zammad-mcp-server
title: Zammad MCP Server
description: Production-ready Zammad MCP Server for Zammad 6.0+ and 7.x (tested on 7.1). Connect Claude, Cursor, and LLMs to your helpdesk via MCP.

environmentVariables.name: ZAMMAD_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Zammad instance.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_DENIED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of disabled MCP tools, for example delete_ticket,delete_user,delete_organization.
